data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for receipt and refund logic per payer, but the evidence does not demonstrate that the system implements this logic effectively. While the linked use case describes a scenario where refunds route back to each original payer, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the implementation of this logic in the system. The existing evidence focuses on booking confirmations and payment statuses but lacks specific details on how receipts and refunds are managed per individual payer, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of receipt and refund logic being implemented per individual payer.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
